Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CreSts = nullvalue(&CreSts) &CreRecPag = nullvalue(&CreRecPag) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Duplicatas' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &IsMarcado.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &UserUpdate.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' CreCliCodRaz.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDupNro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CreDtaEms.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDtaVct.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDtaPrmPag.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CreVlrDup.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreVlrSdo.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreVenCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreCbrCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreBloNro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' &AuxPedido.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &ActionG.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn' &DoImprimir.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &UserUpdate.Link = addDuplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATAS', 'UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionG.Clear() &ActionG.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ActionG.AddItem(1, 'Pagamentos') &ActionG.AddItem(2, 'Adicionar Obs') If (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto or (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '') ) &ActionG.AddItem(3, 'Envia E-mail') Endif If (CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.Cancelada) &ActionG.AddItem(4, 'Cancelar') Endif &ActionG.AddItem(5, 'Log.Alteração') &DoImprimir.FromImage(ActionPrinter) &DoImprimir.TooltipText = "Imprimir" &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup &IsMarcado.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn', !'WWColumn') &UserUpdate.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWIconActionColumn') CreCliCodRaz.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreDupNro.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') CreDtaEms.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreDtaPrmPag.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') CreVlrDup.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreVlrSdo.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreVenCod.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreCbrCod.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') CreBloNro.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') &AuxPedido.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') &ActionG.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWActionGroupColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWActionGroupColumn') &DoImprimir.ColumnClass = iif(CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada, !'WWActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWActionColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionG.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionG = 1 Do 'Do AddPgto' Case &ActionG = 2 Do 'Do AddObs' Case &ActionG = 3 Do 'Do Email' Case &ActionG = 4 Do 'Do Cancelar' Case &ActionG = 5 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &ActionG = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoaddDupli' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPDespesaVeiculo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImprimirSelecionadas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro1.Visible = False &CreBloNro1.Visible = False &CreCbrCod1.Visible = False &CreCbrNom1.Visible = False &CreVenCod1.Visible = False &CreCod1.Visible = False &CreVlrDup1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro2.Visible = False &CreBloNro2.Visible = False &CreCbrCod2.Visible = False &CreCbrNom2.Visible = False &CreVenCod2.Visible = False &CreCod2.Visible = False &CreVlrDup2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro3.Visible = False &CreBloNro3.Visible = False &CreCbrCod3.Visible = False &CreCbrNom3.Visible = False &CreVenCod3.Visible = False &CreCod3.Visible = False &CreVlrDup3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddPgto' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddObs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Email' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREVLRSDO", "", not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreVlrSdo.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRESTS", "", not &CreSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRERECPAG", "", not &CreRecPag.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreRecPag, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREDTAVCT", "", not (&CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() AND &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CreDtaVct.ToString().Trim(), &CreDtaVct_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECOD' AND not &CreCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECOD' AND not &CreCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECOD' AND not &CreCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Duplicatas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
